ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "artists" TEXT /* Artists associated with the track */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track is explicit */,
  "track_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the track */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "track_lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the track */,
  "track_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information of the track */,
  "track_producer" TEXT /* Producer of the track */,
  "track_language" TEXT /* Language of the track */,
  "track_explicit_rating" TEXT /* Detailed explicit content rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_track_genre FOREIGN KEY ("track_genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy score of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in beats per minute */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo detection */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key detection */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode detection */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the time signature detection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "artist_genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "artist_bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the artist */,
  "artist_social_media" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "artist_website" TEXT /* Artist's official website */,
  "artist_follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "album_genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "album_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album art */,
  "album_copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the album */,
  "album_label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_parent_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_genre_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_parent_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, content creator) */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "user_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_device" TEXT /* Primary device of the user */,
  "user_preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., favorite genres, artists) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "playlist_privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (public, private) */,
  "playlist_collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each playlist-track relationship */,
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* ID of the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* Order of the track in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* ID of the track */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, skip, like) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity (e.g., how long a track was played) */,
  "activity_location" TEXT /* Location where the activity occurred */,
  "activity_device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)
